func:
let incoming={
  "type": "data",
  "devices": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "ai": [
        "00000",
        "00189",
        "29100",
        "00001",
        "00000",
        "00000",
        "00000",

        "00004",
        "00005",
        "00000",

        "16390",

        "00000",
        "00000",

      ],
      "di": [
        0,

      ],
      "do": [

      ],
      "flt": [

        0,
        0
      ]
    }
  ],
  "intent": "LO",
  "timer": "0",
  "amode": "0",
  "onovr": "0",
  "offovr": "0",
  "time": "2026-02-19 17:16:50"
}

// Access ai array
let ai = incoming.devices[0].ai;

if (!ai || ai.length < 3) {
    node.error("ai array invalid", msg);
    return null;
}

// Convert values
let highWord = parseInt(ai[1]) || 0;
let lowWord = parseInt(ai[2]) || 0;
let lpm = parseInt(ai[0]) / 10 || 0;

// Totalizer calculation
let total = (highWord * 65536) + lowWord;

// Final output format
msg.payload = {
    lpm: lpm,
    total: total
};

return msg;
